title: Fidelity Benchmarks: Standardized Metrics for Quantum Hardware
description: Master the standardized metrics and protocols used to evaluate quantum hardware performance. Learn about randomized benchmarking, quantum volume, CLOPS, and application-specific benchmarks.
learningObjectives: Explain the mathematical foundations of gate and process fidelity
Implement and interpret randomized benchmarking protocols
Calculate and compare quantum volume across different systems
Understand CLOPS and other throughput metrics
Critically evaluate benchmark results and their limitations
